name: com.apple.screensaver.user
title: Screensaver User
description: The payload that configures a user's screen saver settings.

payload.content: Specifies *user* screen saver settings. (Settings for Login Window screen saver use a different payload)

payloadkeys.content: The name of the screen saver module.
A full path to the screen saver module to use.
The number of seconds of inactivity before the screen saver activates (`0` = Never activate).
